note: Surface-completeness triage for the unstETH WithdrawalQueueERC721 implementation (called via the OssifiableProxy 0x889edc..f9b1). Lido-specific surface = requestWithdrawals(+WstETH/+WithPermit) (unstake: burn stETH/wstETH, mint NFT) and claimWithdrawal(s)(To) (claim finalized ETH). ERC721 NFT funcs are exclude — generic ERC721 covered by the erc721 standard adapter (unstETH to be registered in tokens/1 as erc721 in P1).

0xd6681042.name: requestWithdrawals
0xd6681042.reason: LIQUID-STAKING unstake request — burns stETH (amounts[]) and mints withdrawal-request NFTs to owner; enters the withdrawal queue. New liquid_staking domain (Tier 3).

0x19aa6257.name: requestWithdrawalsWstETH
0x19aa6257.reason: unstake request denominated in wstETH (amounts[]) -> NFTs to owner.

0xacf41e4d.name: requestWithdrawalsWithPermit
0xacf41e4d.reason: unstake request with an embedded EIP-2612 permit (stETH) in calldata; same intent as requestWithdrawals plus an allowance grant.

0x7951b76f.name: requestWithdrawalsWstETHWithPermit
0x7951b76f.reason: wstETH unstake request with embedded EIP-2612 permit in calldata.

0xf8444436.name: claimWithdrawal
0xf8444436.reason: claim finalized ETH for one withdrawal-request NFT (requestId).

0xe3afe0a3.name: claimWithdrawals
0xe3afe0a3.reason: batch-claim finalized ETH for multiple requestIds (with finalization hints).

0x5e7eead9.name: claimWithdrawalsTo
0x5e7eead9.reason: batch-claim finalized ETH to an explicit recipient.

0x095ea7b3.name: approve
0x095ea7b3.reason: standard ERC721 approve (NFT) — covered by the erc721 standard adapter; generic, not Lido-specific.

0xa22cb465.name: setApprovalForAll
0xa22cb465.reason: standard ERC721 operator approval (NFT) — generic ERC721 covered by the erc721 standard adapter; not a Lido-specific permission primitive.

0x23b872dd.name: transferFrom
0x23b872dd.reason: standard ERC721 transferFrom (NFT) — erc721 standard adapter.

0x42842e0e.name: safeTransferFrom
0x42842e0e.reason: standard ERC721 safeTransferFrom (NFT) — erc721 standard adapter.

0xb88d4fde.name: safeTransferFrom
0xb88d4fde.reason: standard ERC721 safeTransferFrom-with-data (NFT) — erc721 standard adapter.

0xb6013cef.name: finalize
0xb6013cef.reason: keeper/core — only Lido core finalizes the queue (payable); not a user call.

0xf3f449c7.name: pauseFor
0xf3f449c7.reason: governance — PauseRole pauses for a duration.

0xabe9cfc8.name: pauseUntil
0xabe9cfc8.reason: governance — PauseRole pauses until a timestamp.

0x55f804b3.name: setBaseURI
0x55f804b3.reason: admin — MANAGE_TOKEN_URI_ROLE sets the NFT base URI.

0x92b18a47.name: setNFTDescriptorAddress
0x92b18a47.reason: admin — MANAGE_TOKEN_URI_ROLE sets the NFT descriptor.
